Our Members Gathered for the Traditional Eid Greeting Ceremony

25.03.2026

Our academic and administrative staff came together at the traditional Eid celebration ceremony.

The academic and administrative personnel of Ibn Haldun University gathered for the Eid Ceremony following the month of Ramadan to exchange greetings for the Eid al-Fitr on March 24, 2026.

The ceremony commenced with speeches by our Secretary General, Sebahattin Belik, and our President, Prof. Atilla Arkan. The speeches addressed the University’s future projects, highlighting recent achievements such as the 5-year full accreditation granted by the Turkish Higher Education Quality Council (THEQC). Furthermore, the remarks touched upon newly implemented educational systems, the recently inaugurated Darüşşifa (Healing House) at our Süleymaniye Campus, the ongoing restoration of historical madrasas, the Yalova Language Village, and our centers in Aleppo and Damascus, Syria. Following the speeches, a collective celebration among members was held.

We wish our members many more wonderful Eids to come.
